append_empty : ∀ (l : Log), l.append Log.empty = l
empty_append : ∀ (l : Log), Log.empty.append l = l
append_assoc : ∀ (a b c : Log), (a.append b).append c = a.append (b.append c)
length_append : ∀ (a b : Log), (a.append b).length = a.length + b.length
